headline: Over A Barrel? Middle East Energy Crisis' Next Phase
summary: The Iran crisis drives oil shortages as Brent/WTI jumps; the UAE's OPEC exit reshapes supply. Click to learn more on where the price of oil may be headed.

headline: ProPetro Holding Posts Narrower-Than-Expected Q1 Loss, Sales Beat
summary: PUMP expects 2026 capital expenditures of $540-$610 million, while PROPWR anticipates capital spending of approximately $400-$450 million.

raw.headline: ProPetro Holding Posts Narrower-Than-Expected Q1 Loss, Sales Beat

headline: Delek US Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Adjusted EBITDA Up Y/Y
summary: DK expects total crude throughput in the range of 283,000-303,000 bpd and total throughput in the band of 293,000-313,000 bpd for the second quarter of 2026.

headline: 10-13% Yields To Supercharge Your Early Retirement
summary: While single-digit yields with steady growth are typically safer, some double-digit yielding income machines offer strong sustainability. Find out why these 10% plus plays work.
